task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the record for patient Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient chart, demographic page, or search result specifically for 'Maria Santos' is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the billing or invoice creation screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A billing, invoice, or Create Bill screen is visible within the Oscar EMR interface for Maria Santos.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct invoice details: 'Sick Note', $20.00, and private/patient payer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The billing form shows 'Sick Note' in the description/service area, '20.00' in the fee/amount field, and the payer type is set to 'Patient', 'Private', or 'Uninsured' (not a provincial health plan).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved or finalized the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, a generated invoice receipt, or the patient's billing history showing the completed $20.00 private invoice.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Oscar EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser (like Firefox) navigating the Oscar EMR web interface, rather than API testing tools or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly insert the invoice into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL queries (e.g., INSERT INTO billing) or script executions to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'localhost:8080/oscar' and the interface matches the standard Oscar EMR layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Expected Invoice Amount: $20.00. Expected Payer Type: Patient (Private/Uninsured). Invoice Reason: Sick Note. Oscar EMR URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. The VLM should verify that the invoice is billed directly to the patient and not to a provincial health insurance plan.
